headline: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Stock Looks Reasonable On Earnings While Cash Flow Looks Strong
summary: Ulta Beauty stock sits at an interesting point for valuation focused investors, with a 45.0% return over the last five years set against an intrinsic value estimate from a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model that currently points to the shares trading at a 15.1% discount to that estimate. Over five years, Ulta Beauty has returned 45.0%, which suggests long term shareholders have been rewarded even though the stock has not moved in a straight line. headline: Is the Options Market Predicting a Spike in Ulta Beauty Stock?
summary: Investors need to pay close attention to ULTA stock based on the movements in the options market lately.

headline: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Could Be 22% Undervalued After Kelly Garcia CTO Appointment
summary: Why Kelly Garcia’s CTO Appointment Matters For Ulta Beauty Stock Ulta Beauty (ULTA) has put technology in sharper focus by appointing board member Kelly Garcia as Chief Technology Officer, effective August 31, 2026, after his tenure leading Domino’s global tech efforts. For you as an investor, this move is less about a headline management change and more about how Ulta Beauty plans to use technology across e-commerce, loyalty, and cybersecurity to support its Ulta Beauty Unleashed...
